source: eccodes 2.34.1 grib_get_data + grib_get. Oracle for DRS template 5.200 (grid_run_length) at bitsPerValue=8. Hand-built: §0-§4 from regular_latlon_surface.grib2, §5/§6/§7 synthesised by tools/build_grib2_runlength_fixtures.py (eccodes cannot CLI-encode run-length). Runs exercise a >range multi-digit run and a level-0 (missing) run. Provenance in NOTICE.md.
